title: bidens andicola var. andicola
intro: Bidens andicola var. andicola, also known as Andean beggarticks, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Bidens andicola var. andicola has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is also known to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the recovery from illnesses. Herbal preparations of Bidens andicola var. andicola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
